title: Perfectly Pan Seared Russian Steak Dumplings
description: A savory and crumbly Russian dish featuring fillet of steak, perfect for a sick day, and made with halal-friendly ingredients. This dish is shaped like nigiri for a unique presentation.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the beef fillet, onion, and garlic.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, egg, water, salt, and black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a small piece of beef in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the beef to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
